raw_title: Convergent Epistemic Practices in Visual Fact-Checking
title_en: Convergent Epistemic Practices in Visual Fact-Checking
title_zh: 视觉事实核查中的趋同认知实践
plain_summary_zh: 这篇研究探讨了在数字新闻环境中，人们如何通过视觉内容进行事实核查。它关注不同背景的人如何采用相似的方法来验证图像和视频的真实性，以及这些方法如何帮助人们理解复杂的媒体信息。
plain_summary_en: This research examines how people fact-check visual content in digital journalism. It focuses on how individuals from different backgrounds use similar methods to verify the authenticity of images and videos, and how these approaches help them understand complex media information.
research_direction_zh: 数字新闻学中的视觉验证与认知实践研究
research_direction_en: Research on visual verification and epistemic practices in digital journalism
